Class CanvasPane

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
gui.CanvasPane
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class CanvasPane extends javafx.scene.layout.Pane
A multi-layered pixel-art canvas for WigglyPaint.

The CanvasPane provides four stacked layers:

  • layer0 – background + border
  • layer1 – wiggle frame A
  • layer2 – wiggle frame B
  • layer3 – cursor / input layer
Internally, all painting occurs on a 200×200 logical pixel grid (for crisp pixel art). The entire StackPane is then scaled to 500×500 for display while preserving nearest-neighbor sharpness.

CanvasPane also handles theme updates and provides coordinate conversion between displayed pixels and internal pixel coordinates.

    • toInternalX

      public double toInternalX(double x)
      Converts an X coordinate from display space (scaled) into internal pixel-art space (200×200).
      Parameters:
      x - display pixel X
      Returns:
      internal pixel-art X

    • toInternalY

    • getInternalSize

      public int getInternalSize()
      Returns:
      internal pixel resolution (200).

    • getDisplaySize

      public int getDisplaySize()
      Returns:
      displayed resolution (500).

    • getCanvasSize

      public int getCanvasSize()
      Alias for internal size, used by controllers.

    • getCursorLayer

      public javafx.scene.canvas.Canvas getCursorLayer()
      Returns:
      the cursor/input layer (layer3). This is where eraser previews and input shapes are drawn.

    • clearCursor

      public void clearCursor()
      Clears the cursor layer (layer3), removing eraser preview outlines.
